{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The armor is crafted by a great craftsman of that time. It is also known as "Sendai armor" because it was used by Date Masamune and his vassals, and is based on a prototype of the Yukishita armor.
|affct=CIV
|hard=HP
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=5
|water=5
|fire=10
|wind=6
|form=Mutant
|element=Fire
|realm=Cathay
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
